NiziU（日語：ニジュー；韓語：니쥬），為日本索尼音樂娛樂和韓國JYP娛樂聯手打造的日本九人女子團體，成員通過JYP自製生存實境節目《Nizi Project》篩選而出。最終由九名成員山口真子（Mako）、大江梨久（Riku）、橫井里茉（Rima）、花橋梨緒（Rio）、勝村摩耶（Maya）、鈴野未光（Miihi）、小合麻由佳（Mayuka）、新井彩花（Ayaka）和牧野仁菜（Nina）組成，2020年秋季在日本出道。

• She especially started feeling like becoming a kpop idol when she was in 3rd year of junior high school (around 14/15 years old), but she wasn’t expecting it can come true since she wasn’t from Korea.
• It was RIKU’s dream to become an idol since she was in kindergarten.
• in the regional qualifying, JYP said to Riku “You still lack of some abilities or skills, but your naturalness is wonderful.
• In the Tokyo camp, Riku talked to Mayuka like “Where are you from ??😆😆😆” (so hyped)
• Riku proactively talked to other people in Tokyo camp because she loved to talk with ppl who have same dream as her.
• Riku chose FANCY of TWICE for the dance test in Tokyo camp cuz she learned that dance in dance school and she felt it was the best song she can do her best.
• Riku wasn’t that confident in dancing and she looked for her name from the bottom of the ranking, but had to keep looking for her name untill the 6th. Riku didn’t expect herself to place that high
• When Riku first saw other participants in Tokyo camp, she felt insecure if she could make it among those pretty girls.
• When Rio saw Riku talking to other participants a lot in the Tokyo camp, Rio could feel Riku really wanted to get closer to other girls.
• it was Riku’s first time singing in korean with the showcase of Tokyo camp, she didn’t understand what she was saying in the song but Rima helped her Korean a lot.
• Riku felt frustrated about her performance in the showcase of Tokyo camp, so she practiced so much harder after the camp.
• Korea was the country Riku wanted to visit the most, she was very happy to be able to go to Korea !
• Riku felt insecure seeing other girls dancing well in the Korean camp that she even cried.
• Riku had different kind of nervousness that she had to perform the song (Who’s your mama) in front of the original artist (JYP).
• Riku says the compliment JYP gave to Riku after the heat shaker, “I can’t imagine how it would’ve been if Riku san wasn’t in Nizi Project.” , was the best compliment she got in her life.
• Rio says she loves Riku’s high note in heart shaker that she gets goosebumps every time she listens to.

Miihi's #9NiziStories A thread:
• NiziU members say Miihi is the most calm one.
•Miihi had opportunity to sing on a stage when she was little, and that experience made her interested in becoming a singer.
•Miihi’s favourite song is “Sakuranbo (=Cherry)” by Ai Otsuka.
•Miihi wasn’t satisfied with her singing she did at the regional qualifying.
•Miihi was overwhelmed by JYP’s aura when she saw him at the regional qualifying.
• JYP to Miihi at the regional qualifying
“You have such an energy which makes people happy. I’m already looking forward to listening to your singing again. “
•The day before the regional qualifying, Miihi Mako Rima were staying in a same room of a hotel.
• first impression of Miihi
Maya: What is this cute creature ??!!
Rima: a cute heroine from an anime
•Miihi had no experience in dancing before becoming a JYP trainee.
•Miihi originally likes to sing ballade songs.
•Nina says Miihi is really good at expressing songs.
•Miihi studied how to sing “Yuki no Hana” by watching videos of the original singer, considering about the meaning of the lyrics.
•When JYP told Miihi that Miihi looked like a person in a Manga after her star quality, she wasn’t sure it was a compliment
•Miihi says “TWICE senpai was the one made me enter JYPE, I was happy to be able to perform in front of them”
• Miihi says she was always in the position to follow One-chan (older sisters), so she felt pressured to be the leader in the showcase of Tokyo Camp
•Miihi says she is keeping her cube pendant at home, but after the korean camp, it became so big that it makes her shoulder stiff
•Miihi and Ayaka shared a room in the begging of the Korean Camp.
• Miihi and Ayaka have many things in common, like they both like pink and shopping. They went for shopping sometimes during the Korean camp.
• Miihi says she was feeling so good seeing JYP’s that reaction while she was singing “nobody”.
•Very Very Very team recorded videos of their facial expressions by themselves to improve their performance.
•Miihi was happy to be in the same team as Rima and Ayaka who knew her well.
•Miihi studied about love by watching “僕は明日、昨日の君とデートをする(pic) ” before the Nobody performance.
• the toughest thing for Miihi was when she couldn’t be sure about her good points and charms.
• Mako says she loves this angle of Miihi from “Feel special” performance.
•“ Feel special” members cried so hard after they figured the meaning of the song out, like “omg this song is great TT”
•Miihi talks her mom on the phone everyday
• Miihi says she could enjoy the “Make you happy” stage thanks to JYP’s words (“No one can beat you if you enjoy the stage” )
•Miihi expected she wouldn’t be able to sleep the day before finale, but actually she could
•Rio: I love when Miihi is wearing ponytail. When I first met her, she was wearing ponytail, it was too cute that I wanted to hug her. It was REALLY cute.
(all translations from @NiziU_ENG)

•Miihi originally likes to sing ballade songs.
•Nina says Miihi is really good at expressing songs.
•Miihi studied how to sing “Yuki no Hana” by watching videos of the original singer, considering about the meaning of the lyrics.
•When JYP told Miihi that Miihi looked like a person in a Manga after her star quality, she wasn’t sure it was a compliment
•Miihi says “TWICE senpai was the one made me enter JYPE, I was happy to be able to perform in front of them”
• Miihi says she was always in the position to follow One-chan (older sisters), so she felt pressured to be the leader in the showcase of Tokyo Camp
•Miihi says she is keeping her cube pendant at home, but after the korean camp, it became so big that it makes her shoulder stiff
•Miihi and Ayaka shared a room in the begging of the Korean Camp.
• Miihi and Ayaka have many things in common, like they both like pink and shopping. They went for shopping sometimes during the Korean camp.
• Miihi says she was feeling so good seeing JYP’s that reaction while she was singing “nobody”.
•Very Very Very team recorded videos of their facial expressions by themselves to improve their performance.
•Miihi was happy to be in the same team as Rima and Ayaka who knew her well.
•Miihi studied about love by watching “僕は明日、昨日の君とデートをする(pic) ” before the Nobody performance.
• the toughest thing for Miihi was when she couldn’t be sure about her good points and charms.
• Mako says she loves this angle of Miihi from “Feel special” performance.
•“ Feel special” members cried so hard after they figured the meaning of the song out, like “omg this song is great TT”
•Miihi talks her mom on the phone everyday
• Miihi says she could enjoy the “Make you happy” stage thanks to JYP’s words (“No one can beat you if you enjoy the stage” )
•Miihi expected she wouldn’t be able to sleep the day before finale, but actually she could
•Rio: I love when Miihi is wearing ponytail. When I first met her, she was wearing ponytail, it was too cute that I wanted to hug her. It was REALLY cute.
